use_codes.desc: METHOD FOR TREATING GLAUCOMA AND OCULAR HYPERTENSION

indications.text:

patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension who are intolerant of other intraocular
pressure lowering medications or insufficiently responsive (failed to achieve target IOP determined after...
